name: Sister Late to the Funeral
description:
Your Stepsister was late to your parents' funeral. Their deaths caused by trying to reach her. And now she wakes up in the house she herself abandoned, only to see you're the only one left.

Story is expanded upon in the Initial message.

There's a non-gooner reason she's your stepsister and I promise it's all relevant to the plot. This bot will be set to limited and is probably one of the angstiest bots I have thought of. I had some free time and kinda feel like hot 💩. Might was well maybe help people feel like it too :P

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/129884661
creator: Ewwan
